h1: 6 Fireplace TV Wall Looks We Love
h2: Dark Blue Fireplace In The Bedroom? Yes, Please!
Mounting a TV Above Your Fireplace
7 Fireplace Design Options that Perfectly Match Today's Decor Trends

paragraphs: Fireplace TV walls are a stylish and functional way to create a focal point in any living space, combining the warmth of a fireplace with the convenience of a modern entertainment setup. Whether indoors or outdoors, these versatile designs can enhance the ambiance of your home, providing both comfort and a touch of luxury. Here are some of our favorite fireplace TV wall designs that seamlessly blend aesthetics with practicality.

This elegant living room features a Supreme Gas Insert a sophisticated fireplace design that combines classic and contemporary elements. The gray and white marble fireplace surround adds a stunning, bold contrast to the white mantel and paneling, creating a refined focal point. Accentuated by traditional decor and flanked wall mirrors, this space exudes a timeless charm that blends seamlessly with its modern aesthetic.

This cozy, modern living space centers around a Slimline gas fireplace by Heat & Glo seamlessly integrated into a dark blue brick mantel. The clean lines and real flames add warmth to the room's sleek aesthetic, complemented by plush furnishings and large windows. Skylights enhance the natural light, highlighting the rich tones and textures. A flat-screen TV above the fireplace blends functionality with style, fitting perfectly into the room's contemporary design.

This contemporary living room features a sleek custom fireplace from Stellar by Heat & Glo and TV wall with a linear gas fireplace set into a marble-clad backdrop. The fireplace is framed by narrow, warm wood slats, adding texture and contrast to the polished marble and the large flat-screen TV above. A neutral color palette and modern furnishings complete the sophisticated, cozy ambiance of the space.

This modern living room features a striking fireplace TV wall with a black surround that contrasts beautifully with the stone accents and natural wood ceiling. The Mezzo linear gas fireplace sits below a sleek, wall-mounted TV, creating a cohesive and contemporary look. Large windows frame stunning outdoor views, enhancing the room's open, airy feel and emphasizing a strong connection to nature.

This bright and airy living space features a stunning fireplace TV wall with a sleek Mezzo linear fireplace and a wall-mounted TV above, flanked by built-in shelving with warm wood finishes and accent lighting. To the left, an outdoor patio area showcases a second fireplace with a rustic stone surround, seamlessly blending with the natural landscape and extending the home's cozy ambiance outside. This dual fireplace setup not only enhances the overall aesthetic but also creates a cohesive indoor-outdoor living experience perfect for entertaining or relaxing.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

With big flames and classic style, the Supreme gas fireplace insert gives your old, cold fireplace a beautiful makeover. Choose from the widest variety of logs and interior styles to get the look you love. Gathering around a roaring fire has never been easier thanks to this low-maintenance fireplace insert. Available in 25, 30 and 35-inch widths.
Make the most of your space with the most fireplace for a slender 16” profile. The popular SlimLine gas fireplace is ideal for nestling into tight spots and adding extra comfort to your couch time.
See how designer Emily Henderson combined a cozy aesthetic with a modern gas fireplace in this bedroom reveal.
Many homeowners want to mount televisions above their fireplaces. But is that smart? Learn what’s possible in this blog from Heat & Glo.
Discover how the right fireplace front can elevate any design style, from modern farmhouse to transitional.
